cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir. I'm calling about the writing desk you posted on Bikroy.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Ah, haan, yes. The writing desk. What about it?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm interested in buying it, sir. Can we discuss the price?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Price is 8000 rupees. It's a good deal, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I was thinking more along the lines of 7000 rupees, ji. Can we meet in the middle?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, okay. 7500 rupees. That's the best I can do.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that sounds good. I'll pay via BHIM when I pick it up, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, yes, that's fine. Just inspect it and pay when you're satisfied.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, can I confirm your name for the pickup?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Roshan Kumar. Just call me when you're on your way, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Will do, sir. We'll finalize the details then.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, sounds good. I have to go, sir. Busy with work.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: No problem, sir. Have a good day, Roshan Kumar ji.
